ogTitle: Fossilbrook vs Four Ways: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fossilbrook and Four Ways.
heading: Fossilbrook vs Four Ways — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fossilbrook, Queensland and Four Ways, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Four Ways has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Fossilbrook (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fossilbrook or Four Ways safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fossilbrook has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Four Ways scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fossilbrook scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Four Ways scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fossilbrook or Four Ways?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Four Ways has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
